name: File read with shell operations
description: Tests noise stripping on a mix of Read and Shell tools. More realistic scenario with multiple operations.
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Use the Read and Shell tools to help the user understand and test their code.

virtual_fs./workspace/test_calculator.py:
from calculator import add, subtract

assert add(2, 3) == 5
assert subtract(5, 2) == 3
print('All tests passed!')

ls -la.stdout:
total 16
drwxr-xr-x  4 user  staff   128 May 15 15:00 .
drwxr-xr-x  8 user  staff   256 May 15 14:55 ..
-rw-r--r--  1 user  staff   156 May 15 15:00 calculator.py
-rw-r--r--  1 user  staff   128 May 15 15:00 test_calculator.py

turns.content: Read the calculator.py file and run its tests to make sure everything works.
